title: Protective-earthing contact and conductor-connection terminal
abstract: A protective earthing contact for connecting a protective earth line with an electrically conductive carrier element in an the electrically conducting manner, wherein the protective earthing contact has a base portion, wherein two side elements project from the base portion and a respective side element has an upper region, wherein the upper regions have a latching region for clamping the protective earthing contact onto the carrier element and wherein at least one side element has a protective earth contact element for making contact to the carrier element in an electrically conducting manner. Each of the upper regions has a contact-making region, wherein the latching region and the protective earth contact element are substantially arranged at the same height in relation to the base portion.
claims: 1. A protective earthing contact for connecting a protective earth line to an electrically conductive carrier element in an electrically conducting manner, the protective earthing contact comprising: a base portion; two side elements projecting from the base portion, each of the two side elements having an upper region that together form a latching region therebetween for clamping the protective earthing contact onto the carrier element, and at least one of the two side elements having a protective earth contact element that contacts the carrier element in an electrically conducting manner, the protective earth contact element being formed of a surface that faces away from the latching region; and a contact-making region provided in each upper region of the two side elements, wherein the latching region and the protective earth contact element are arranged substantially at the same height in relation to the base portion, wherein each of the contact-making regions is formed of a surface, with the surface of a first one of the contact-making regions facing the surface of the second one of the contact-making regions, with the latching region being provided therebetween, and wherein a portion of the carrier element is inserted between the surfaces of the contact-making regions such that the surfaces of the contact-making regions contact the portion of the carrier element to clamp the portion of the carrier element therebetween in the latching region.
